lastFailureSignature: opencli|command-failed|Error: Breakcold API key not found. Option 1: dotnet user-secrets set "Breakcold:ApiKey" "your-api-key" Option 2: Set environment variable BREAKCOLD_API_KEY
lastFailureMessage:
Error: Breakcold API key not found.
Option 1: dotnet user-secrets set "Breakcold:ApiKey" "your-api-key"
Option 2: Set environment variable BREAKCOLD_API_KEY
